heading: Sunday Night
text: Partly cloudy south, more cloud cover north. Cloud cover building overnight from the west. A few flurries possible north of Route 2. Lows from the low to mid 30s, a few 20s in the cold spots of the northeast. Light south wind.

heading: Monday
text: Occasional breaks of morning sunshine otherwise mostly cloudy. Increasing chance for evening rain showers. Milder. Highs in the 40s to low 50s northeast, 50s to near 60 in the southern valleys. Southwest wind near 10 mph.

heading: Monday Night
text: Periods of clouds, with a slight chance of a rain or snow shower early. Lows in the 20s east and north of I-89, 30 to 35 west and south.
